user_question: Show the top 10 countries by event count in the last 7 days.
schema_context: Index: gkg. Date field: GkgRecordId.Date. Country field: V2Locations.CountryCode.keyword. Ranking questions should use aggregations and size=0.

user_question: List 5 recent events mentioning Iran in the last 3 days.
schema_context: Index: gkg. Date field: GkgRecordId.Date. Country filter may use V2Locations.CountryCode.keyword. Retrieval questions should return hits, not only aggs.

user_question: Which 10 people were mentioned most often this month?
schema_context: Index: gkg. Person field: V2Persons.V1Person.keyword. Date field: GkgRecordId.Date. Top-N ranking should use terms aggregation with size=0.

user_question: Return the top 5 event themes in the past 14 days.
schema_context: Index: gkg. Theme field: V2Themes.V1Theme.keyword. Date field: GkgRecordId.Date. Theme ranking should use aggregations.

user_question: Get 10 articles from the last week mentioning Saudi Arabia.
schema_context: Index: gkg. Use date filter on GkgRecordId.Date. Country filter may use V2Locations.CountryCode.keyword = SA. Retrieval questions can return hits.
